allow:
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$input_dir = 'E:\\\\Code V2\\\\griscreen\\\\public\\\\gs-videos'
\\$output_dir = 'E:\\\\Code V2\\\\griscreen\\\\public\\\\reels'
\\$videos = @\('ambience','aug-reel','cnb-teaser','compilation','desert1','food','ghibli-art','Interior','outlet','outlet-opening','reel-1','reel-1-2','reel-2-3','thumb','zuhrah'\)
foreach \(\\$v in \\$videos\) {
    Write-Host \\"Compressing \\$v...\\"
    ffmpeg -i \\"\\$input_dir\\\\\\$v.mp4\\" -vcodec libx264 -crf 28 -preset slow -acodec aac -b:a 128k -movflags +faststart \\"\\$output_dir\\\\\\$v.mp4\\" -y 2>&1 | Select-String 'frame=|error|Error' | Select-Object -Last 3
    Write-Host \\"Done: \\$v\\"
}
Write-Host 'All videos compressed!'
" 2>&1)
